form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently won by 3.5 len at Sirinyer All Weather April 2 over 1900m defeating Toros Express with 60kg at $2. The race before that 3rd of 7 at Sirinyer All Weather on March 13 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Obrada carrying 58kg at $6.35. Sure to go well again.

The race before that 3rd of 7 at Sirinyer All Weather on March 13 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Obrada carrying 58kg at $6.35. Sure to go well again.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 12 at Sirinyer All Weather in G1 on March 15 over 2100m, 16 len behind The Protecter carrying 60kg at $28.60. The start before that 3rd of 7 at Sirinyer All Weather on February 26 over 1900m, 2 len behind Brave Champion carrying 58kg at $11.10. Can make amends for a modest effort last time.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up ran last of 7 at Sirinyer All Weather on March 13 over 1600m, 35 len behind Obrada carrying 56kg at $45.95. Second-up made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 8 at Sirinyer All Weather on April 2 over 1900m, 3.5 len behind Junior Baskan carrying 55.5kg at $9.55. Hard to enthuse.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months ran last in a small field at Sirinyer All Weather on March 12 over 2100m, 18 len behind Can Alus with 53kg at $12.85. Previously second-up 6th of 11 at this track on April 10 over 2000m, slow going 8 len behind Birdwood with 56kg at $18.05. Expect a forward showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Second-up. Previously second-up 6th of 11 at this track on April 10 over 2000m, slow going 8 len behind Birdwood with 56kg at $18.05. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Not raced for 55 days. First-up 4th in a small field at Antalya on January 20 over 2100m, 9 len behind Queen Proteo carrying 59kg at $6.10. Second run from a spell 7th of 9 at Veliefendi All Weather on February 14 over 2100m, 9 len behind Dagmar carrying 57kg at $18.30. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four months. Finished off last preparation second last of 7 at Sirinyer All Weather December 19 over 1400m, 14 len behind Nikko with 55kg at $20.70. Previously first up; ran last in a small field at Sirinyer All Weather February 2 2025 over 1400m, 47 len behind Black Galaxy carrying 55kg at $1.45. Others rate better.

form.formComment: Comes off a 57 day let-up. Most recently second last of 9 at Antalya on February 12 over 2100m, 44 len behind Estimate carrying 53kg at $19.55. The run before that 10th of 15 at Antalya on January 16 over 2100m, 10 len behind Baron carrying 57kg at $11.80. Beaten comfortably last start but is capable of better.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign third of 7 at Sirinyer All Weather January 2 over 1900m, 5.5 len behind Zelucci with 54kg at $13.65. On debut third of 9 at Sirinyer All Weather August 18 2024 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Floyd with 55kg at $28.75. Not keen on her chances.
